MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAGE, LOUIS A. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-28-2001 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON SEP-04-2001 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. DEPT. 503A LAWRENCE BEACH BECKER, PRO TEM JUDGE. M. ECHEVERRIA, CLRK. BELDON YEE, CSR. PARTIES PRESENT: PLTF. LOUIS A. GAGE, PRO PER AND DEFT. DEBI MUISE, PRO PER. CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD. PARTIES STIPULATED THAT DEFT. MUISE REMAIN POSSESSION OF PREMISE AT 657 OAK ST, S.F. PROVIDED THAT DEFT. MUISE PAY ALL BACK RENT OF TOTAL AMT. OF $3725 BY 5 PM ON SEPT. 1. 2001. FURTHER, DEFT. MUISE WILL PAY $925 ON SEPT. 15, 2001 FOR SEPT. RENT. THEREAFTER, DEFT. MUISE AGREES TO PAY RENT IN THE BEGINNING OF THE MONTH. LEONARD MILLER WILL NOT BE PERMITTED TO COMMENCE POSSESSION OF THE PREMISE AGAIN. IF DEFT. MUISE DEFAULTS, JUDGMENT WILL BE ENTERED.
